name: activesegments
description: activeSegments — Segment Explorer built with Node.js, Express, TypeScript, SASS and EJS

scripts.copy:assets: rm -rf webapp/assets && mkdir -p webapp/assets && cp -R src/assets/. webapp/assets/
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run compile:ts && npm run compile:sass && npm run copy:assets
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run dev
scripts.all: npm run clean && npm run fetch && npm run build && npm run dev
